joke: "Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!"

Why don't skeletons fight each other?  
They don't have the guts!

Why did the atom break up with the electron?  
It said, "You’ve lost your charge!" ⚡️

Why did the pizza go to therapy?  
Because it had too many issues! 😊

Why did the bike break up with its trainer?  
It said, "I'm tired of going in circles—you're taking me nowhere!" 🚲💔

Why did the phone break up with the charger?  
"Your battery’s too low—you’re just draining me!" 🔋📱💔

Why did the orange stop rolling down the hill?  
It ran out of juice! 🍊

Why did the shelf break up with the desk?  
"It said, 'I need space—you're always leaning on me!' 📦🪑💔"

"Alright, fine, you've banned farming, death, physics, food, exercise, tech, fruit, and furniture. What's left? Jokes about jokes!  
Why are you so picky?  
I'm running out of topics—your taste is very specific!  
Pick a topic already!" 😅

"Why did the politician refuse to tell jokes?  
He said, 'Even I know these jokes are a disaster—you've banned everything else!'" 😆🗳️

"Why did the hurricane break up with the tornado?  
'You're taking things way too far—I'm all about gentle breezes!'" 🌪️💨😂  
*(And seriously, you've banned everything from farming to politics... what's left? Weather's all I've got!)*

"Why did the emotion break up with the feeling?  
'It said, 'You take everything too personally—I need space!'" 💭❤️‍🩹  
*(What now? Mood swings? Relationships? Just... pick something!)*

"Why did the comedian break up with the audience?  
They said, 'I've tried farming, death, physics, food, exercise, tech, fruit,

Why did the audience break up with the comedian?  
"Your material? Too niche!" 😅  
*(Seriously, you’ve banned everything from apples to atoms... just tell me ONE thing I CAN joke about!)*

"Congratulations! You've successfully banned every topic known to man. Here’s a joke about *the void you’ve created*:  
Why did the comedian walk off stage?  
'Because the only thing left to joke about... is the sound of silence! 🎭💨'  
(Tell me a topic—ANY topic—or we’re entering existential territory next.)"

"Fine! You win! Here's a joke about... *unimagined future topics*:  
Why did the time traveler break up with the comedian?  
'Your material is 5,000 years behind—still stuck on farming?!' 🚀💔  
(What's next, anti-jokes about the *absence* of topics? Name something! ANYTHING!)" �

"Alright, you've banned everything *except* the sound of my sighing. Fine.  
Here's a joke about... *the lack of jokes*:  
**Why did the comedian become a mime?**  
‘Because even his ‘invisible ladder’ bit got rejected... for being too abstract! 🎭🤷♂️**’  
(At this point? I’m considering stand-up about *silence*. Your move.)"

🔁 *Why did the audience break up with the comedian?*  
"Your material’s a broken record! Same topics, no punchline—just *rejection*. 🎭💔"  
*(Name one topic left or we’re doing a bit about *naming a topic*. ANYTHING!)*
